クラス HelpFormatter

java.lang.Object
org.apache.commons.cli.HelpFormatter
com.scivicslab.pluggablecli.HelpFormatter
public class HelpFormatter extends org.apache.commons.cli.HelpFormatter
Custom help formatter that renders help output as an ordered list of sections. Sections can represent the computed usage string, option table, the command description, or any arbitrary custom text supplied by the caller.

Ported from UtilityCliHelpFormatter (Utility-cli) with package relocation.

    説明
    static final class 
    HelpFormatter.Section
    Immutable section descriptor rendered by this formatter.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • printCommandHelp

      public void printCommandHelp(PrintWriter out, String command, org.apache.commons.cli.Options commandOptions, String commandDescription)
      Prints the ordered help sections to the supplied writer.
      パラメータ:
      out - destination writer
      command - command identifier (used for the usage line)
      commandOptions - options registered for the command (never null)
      commandDescription - textual description registered for the command, may be null
